_comment: Hand-curated skill->tool links that the auto-discovery scanner (SkillToolLinker) cannot infer from a skill's text - e.g. a skill that drives a tool indirectly or refers to it by capability rather than by its cc-* name. These are merged into the discovered links and flagged 'declared' (vs 'discovered') in the UI so the source is always honest. Keyed by tool name; each entry is a skill name + relation ('drives' = the skill is primarily about this tool, 'uses' = it is one of several).
